originalPrompt: Build a simple todo app with express backend

subtasks.title: Project scaffolding and dependencies
subtasks.description: Create the project directory, initialize npm, install Express and essential dev dependencies, and scaffold the main application file.
subtasks.successCriteria: Project folder exists with package.json, node modules installed, and an app entry file (e.g., app.js or index.js) that can start an Express server.

subtasks.title: Initialize version control
subtasks.description: Initialize a git repository, add a .gitignore that excludes node_modules and environment files, and make the initial commit.
subtasks.successCriteria: Git repository initialized with a first commit including project files and a .gitignore that excludes node_modules.

subtasks.title: Design REST API and data model
subtasks.description: Define the REST endpoints (CRUD) for todos, the request/response payload shapes, status codes, and a simple Todo data model (id, title, completed, createdAt).
subtasks.successCriteria: A short API specification document exists listing endpoints (e.g., GET /todos, POST /todos, GET /todos/:id, PUT /todos/:id, DELETE /todos/:id) and sample request/response bodies.

subtasks.title: Implement data storage and model
subtasks.description: Create a data module that implements the Todo model and CRUD operations using in-memory storage or simple file-based persistence for simplicity.
subtasks.successCriteria: Data module exposes create/read/update/delete functions that persist todos in memory or to a local file and can be imported by route handlers.

subtasks.title: Implement Express routes and controllers
subtasks.description: Implement the Express route handlers per the API spec, wire them to the data module, enable JSON parsing, and ensure correct status codes are returned.
subtasks.successCriteria: All defined endpoints are implemented and return the expected responses when hit (e.g., creating a todo returns 201 with the created item).

subtasks.title: Input validation and error handling
subtasks.description: Add request validation for incoming payloads, implement centralized error-handling middleware, and provide consistent error response formats.
subtasks.successCriteria: Invalid requests return appropriate 4xx errors with clear messages and unexpected failures are handled by error middleware returning 5xx responses without crashing the server.

subtasks.title: Basic tests and documentation
subtasks.description: Write basic automated tests for the main endpoints (unit or integration) and create a README with setup, run instructions, and example API calls.
subtasks.successCriteria: A test suite covering core endpoints passes locally and the README includes clear instructions to install dependencies, run the server, and example requests.

decompositionStrategy: Top-down technical decomposition: bootstrap the project, define the API and data model, implement persistence and route handlers, then add validation and tests. Each subtask is a small, testable milestone with clear dependencies to allow incremental progress.
